description:
Let each tenant define reusable brand kits with logo placement, fonts, color tokens, watermark style, and default export naming rules. Operators can apply a kit with one click when creating compositions.

**Rationale:** Studios want consistent visual identity across events without rebuilding settings each time. Presets reduce setup errors and make output look more professional.
title: Tenant Brand Kit Presets

descriptionHistory.description:
